metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel":
              return f"{s} lies at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level"
          if p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
              return f"{s} lies at an elevation of {o} feet above sea level"
          if p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres":
              return f"{s} is at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level"
with:
  if p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel":
              return f"{s} lies at an elevation of {_fmt_num(o)} metres above sea level"
          if p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
              return f"{s} lies at an elevation of {_fmt_num(o)} feet above sea level"
          if p == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres":
              return f"{s} is at an elevation of {_fmt_num(o)} metres above sea level"
Change 2: Replace:
  # Runway length variants
          if p.endswith("RunwayLengthFeet"):
              idx = p.split("Runway")[0]
              return f"{s}'s {idx.lower()} runway is {o} feet long"
          if p.endswith("RunwayLengthMetre"):
              idx = p.split("Runway")[0]
              return f"{s}'s {idx.lower()} runway is {o} metres long"
with:
  # Runway length variants
          if p.endswith("RunwayLengthFeet"):
              idx = p.split("Runway")[0]
              return f"{s}'s {idx.lower()} runway is {_fmt_num(o)} feet long"
          if p.endswith("RunwayLengthMetre"):
              idx = p.split("Runway")[0]
              return f"{s}'s {idx.lower()} runway is {_fmt_num(o)} metres long"
Change 3: Replace:
  # Fallback for any other predicate
          return f"{s} has {p} {o}"
with:
  # Fallback for any other predicate – format numbers when possible
          formatted_o = _fmt_num(o)
          return f"{s} has {p} {formatted_o}"
